name: Blood Vessel

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Ready to Serve
abilities.text: While this model has a friendly Hunger token, it receives +2 to its Df and Wp.

actions.name: Rend the Flesh
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. If the target is an ally, it is dealt no damage, heals 1, and may remove a Hunger token.

triggers.name: Catch a Glimpse
triggers.text: Look at the top two cards of your fate deck, then place them back in the same order.

actions.name: Sacred Duty
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Ally only. This action does not require LoS. Place this model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: On Guard
triggers.text: Immediately, increase this action's duel total by +2.

actions.name: Rite of Sacrifice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model gains a Hunger token. Declare the Interact action.
